samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal that controls the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output signal with a data width of 16 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">Set to 8 to represent an 8-bit multiplier.</parameter>
        <parameter id="N_1">Set to 7 to represent the number of bits minus one for an 8-bit multiplier.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_en_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_en_in for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_en_in"/>
            <output id="mul_en_out_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <true>
                    <description>Store the value of mul_en_in into mul_en_out_reg.</description>
                    <assignment>
                        <left id="mul_en_out_reg"/>
                        <right id="mul_en_in"/>
                    </assignment>
                </true>
            </always>
            <output id="mul_en_out">
                <description>Output signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled.</description>
                <member id="mul_en_out_reg"/>
                <constant id="0" value="0"/>
            </output>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_a_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_a for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_a"/>
            <output id="mul_a_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <true>
                    <description>Store the value of mul_a into mul_a_reg.</description>
                    <assignment>
                        <left id="mul_a_reg"/>
                        <right id="mul_a"/>
                    </assignment>
                </true>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_b_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_b for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_b"/>
            <output id="mul_b_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <true>
                    <description>Store the value of mul_b into mul_b_reg.</description>
                    <assignment>
                        <left id="mul_b_reg"/>
                        <right id="mul_b"/>
                    </assignment>
                </true>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="sum" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the accumulated sum of partial products for the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="sum"/>
            <output id="sum"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <true>
                    <description>Store the accumulated sum of partial products into sum.</description>
                    <assignment>
                        <left id="sum"/>
                        <right id="sum"/>
                    </assignment>
                </true>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the final product of multiplication for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_out_reg"/>
            <output id="mul_out_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition>
                    <description>On the positive edge of the clock.</description>
                    <constant id="clk" value="1"/>
                </condition>
                <true>
                    <description>Store the final product of multiplication into mul_out_reg.</description>
                    <assignment>
                        <left id="mul_out_reg"/>
                        <right id="mul_out_reg"/>
                    </assignment>
                </true>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic id="temp">
            <description>Temporary wires to store partial products before calculating partial sums.</description>
            <input id="mul_a_reg"/>
            <input id="mul_b_reg"/>
            <output id="temp"/>
            <assign>
                <description>Generate partial products based on the bits of mul_b_reg.</description>
                <left id="temp[0]"/>
                <right>
                    <description>Select the first bit of mul_a_reg if the corresponding bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                    <conditional>
                        <if>
                            <description>Condition to check if the first bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_b_reg[0]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </if>
                        <true>
                            <description>Select the first bit of mul_a_reg.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_a_reg[0]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Select 0 if the condition is not met.</description>
                            <constant id="0" value="0"/>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Generate partial products based on the bits of mul_b_reg.</description>
                <left id="temp[1]"/>
                <right>
                    <description>Select the second bit of mul_a_reg if the corresponding bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                    <conditional>
                        <if>
                            <description>Condition to check if the second bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_b_reg[1]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </if>
                        <true>
                            <description>Select the second bit of mul_a_reg.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_a_reg[1]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Select 0 if the condition is not met.</description>
                            <constant id="0" value="0"/>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Generate partial products based on the bits of mul_b_reg.</description>
                <left id="temp[2]"/>
                <right>
                    <description>Select the third bit of mul_a_reg if the corresponding bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                    <conditional>
                        <if>
                            <description>Condition to check if the third bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_b_reg[2]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </if>
                        <true>
                            <description>Select the third bit of mul_a_reg.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_a_reg[2]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Select 0 if the condition is not met.</description>
                            <constant id="0" value="0"/>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <description>Generate partial products based on the bits of mul_b_reg.</description>
                <left id="temp[3]"/>
                <right>
                    <description>Select the fourth bit of mul_a_reg if the corresponding bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                    <conditional>
                        <if>
                            <description>Condition to check if the fourth bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_b_reg[3]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </if>
                        <true>
                            <description>Select the fourth bit of mul_a_reg.</description>
                            <expression>
                                <constant id="mul_a_reg[3]" value="1"/>
                            </expression>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <description>Select 0 if the condition is not met.</description>
                            <constant id="0" value="0"/>
                        </false>
                    </conditional>
                </right>
            </assign>

                <left id="temp[4]"/>
                <right>
                    <description>Select the fifth bit of mul_a_reg if the corresponding bit of mul_b_reg is 1.</description>
                    <conditional>
                        <if>
                            <description>Condition to
